rationale: No qualitative new events directly affecting Poland this cycle; Iran Hormuz signal and EU accession continue as background, both decaying.

top_events.title: Iran signals Hormuz reopening tied to deal
top_events.summary: A potential Iran deal could ease global energy prices, offering indirect relief to Polish households still sensitive to gas and oil costs — but no final agreement yet.

top_events.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: Formally launched last cycle, this process continues as background — no new qualitative step this cycle for Poland, though it remains a significant regional development.

top_events.title: Putin admits Ukraine attacks hitting Russian economy and society
top_events.summary: Putin's continued strain admission is background signal for Poland; no new escalation or spillover risk detected this cycle.
